note: Template for the resolution keeper (simulated mode, v2 Optimistic Oracle). Copy to data/results.json and fill in real conditionId + outcomeCount values from data/deployed-markets.json (written by create-markets.mjs). winningOutcome is the winning OUTCOME INDEX; payouts are one-hot of length outcomeCount. Conventions: 1X2 [0 Home,1 Draw,2 Away]; OU2.5 [0 Over,1 Under]; BTTS [0 Yes,1 No]; group-winner index = team order; outright/golden-boot [0 Yes,1 No].
